faq.question: Will image quality change when I convert JPG to PNG?
faq.answer: PNG uses lossless compression, so your image quality is preserved while the file becomes more suitable for transparency and editing workflows.

faq.question: Can I upload JPEG files as well as JPG files?
faq.answer: Yes. Both .jpg and .jpeg files are supported by the converter.

faq.question: Why would I convert JPG to PNG?
faq.answer: PNG is often preferred when you need transparency, sharper editing, or a format that works well for graphics and web assets.

faq.question: Is this conversion secure and private?
faq.answer: Yes. The online conversion process is designed to be fast, secure, and convenient for everyday image needs.

faq.question: How do I get my converted file?
faq.answer: Once the conversion finishes, you can download the new PNG file immediately.
